name: should-trigger-on-make-skill
prompt: Make a skill that helps me write database queries
assertions: eval pipeline is started or offered

name: should-trigger-on-skill-improvement
prompt: My code-review skill trigger isn't working, improve it
assertions: Improvement/diagnosis path is taken (not fresh creation)
Existing skill is analyzed before proposing changes

name: should-not-trigger-on-sql-question
prompt: How do I write a SQL JOIN?
assertions: Request is answered directly or routed to documentation/web search
